notes: Verified via WebSearch 2026-07-11: commemorates the Feb 17, 2011 Benghazi uprising; GNU (Tripoli, internationally recognized) issues an annual holiday decision (e.g. Decision No. 55/2026, No. 71/2025).

Confirmed the rival eastern government (Hammad government) canceled celebrations of this anniversary in at least one prior year — both governments' stances reported neutrally per the backlog instruction to cite both when they differ.
Distinguished explicitly from liberation-day-libya (Oct 23) per the project's documented confusion point.
Single-country event (_countryCode: ly), aliasSlugs: [] to avoid base_country_leakage.
